title: TPT vs Earn2Trade (2026): Same Lock, Opposite Rule-Shape Lifecycle
description: TPT and Earn2Trade both lock the trail at starting balance — but TPT shifts the rule shape TWICE inside one account (Test EOD → PRO intraday → PRO+ EOD) while Earn2Trade shifts it once and then 94.77% of passers stay there forever. Honest 2026 side-by-side.

og.title: TPT vs Earn2Trade (2026): Same Lock, Opposite Rule-Shape Lifecycle
og.description: TPT shifts the trail type three times inside one account; Earn2Trade keeps it EOD forever. Same SB lock, opposite lifecycle volatility. Here's how to pick.
